reasoning_chain_text: 1. For fiscal year 2014 Washington agency contracts, record contract counts for community colleges.
2. For fiscal year 2015 Washington agency contracts, record contract counts for community colleges.
3. For fiscal year 2016 Washington agency contracts, record contract counts for community colleges and determine the top three colleges by average contract count across steps 1 through 3.
4. From the Seattle Colleges District article, determine its Washington county.
5. From this college article, determine its Washington county.
6. From the Community Colleges of Spokane article, determine its Washington county.
7. Using the first county article in the sequence, note its 2020 population and county seat.
8. Using the second county article in the sequence, note its 2020 population and county seat, then compare it with step 7 to keep the more populous county and its seat.
9. In the county seat remaining after step 8, identify the building with the highest average greenhouse gas emissions from 2015 through 2023.
10. Return the year that building was built.
original_final_question: Can you find the counties where the top 3 community colleges by average contract count from FY 2014 to FY 2016 in Washington are located in. In those counties, narrow the scope down by choosing the county with the most population according to the 2020 census. In its county seat, what is the building with the highest average greenhouse gas emissions (2015-2023)? Finally, only report the year where this building is built. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Aggregation: Calculate average contracts per community college across 3 years
Result: Top 3 are Seattle Colleges, Green River, Spokane CCs
Node 5: Green River College -> Auburn, Washington
Node 6: Community Colleges of Spokane -> Spokane, Washington
Result: Two counties identified - King County (Seattle, Auburn) and Spokane County (Spokane)
Node 7: King County - 2020 pop: 2,269,675, seat: Seattle
Node 8: Spokane County - 2020 pop: 539,339, seat: Spokane
Result: King County is most populous -> county seat is Seattle
Node 9: Seattle Building Energy Benchmarking shows BOEING PLANT 2 ISAL
(BLDG 2-122)-North Boeing Field Campus has highest average GHG emissions
Result: Boeing Plant 2 ISAL (BLDG 2-122)-North Boeing Field Campus (Boeing Plant 2)
Node 10: Boeing Plant 2 was built in 1936
